definition:
1. to rub down  or away;  hence, 
2. of clothes, to wear out , (Theognis Elegiacus) 
3. of persons, to wear out, exhaust , (Thucydides): —;Pass. to be quite worn out , (Aristophanes Comicus) 
4. of Time, to wear it away, get rid of it , Lat. diem terere, (Demosthenes Orator): κ. τὸν βίον to employ  it fully , (Xenophon Historicus); so in perfect passive to pass one's whole time , κατατέτριμμαι στρατευόμενος (Xenophon Historicus) 
5. of property, to squander , (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
